summary: End-to-end UI testing of Exevori Voice IA — Contacts CRUD + CSV Import Wizard (Phase 3B). All critical flows succeeded: login, list, create, detail sheet, edit (form opens), import wizard 3 steps, fuzzy auto-mapping 6/6 columns, duplicate-action dropdown, import execution (3 imported / 0 errors), and delete. Only one minor anomaly: the 'change status to hot' step did not visibly persist (likely a test-script selector collision with the FilterBar 'Chaud' badge rather than a real bug — the Save button was clicked successfully).

issues: Console accessibility warning: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' (sheet header has a SheetTitle but Radix still warns — likely the loading skeleton render path has no title)

validateDOMNesting warning:
(Badge) inside

(SheetDescription). StatusBadge/UrgencyPill/Tag badges are placed inside SheetDescription which renders as

. Wrap descriptors in a

instead of SheetDescription.
Many 'net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED' console errors — Supabase realtime WSS via 'wss://localhost/?token=...' fails in the preview env. Functional impact: none on tested flows, but noisy console.

test_evidence: Created 'QA Test Contact' → toast 'Contact créé' shown → row visible in table
Detail sheet showed Modifier + Supprimer buttons (data-testid present)
CSV /tmp/qa_test.csv uploaded → step-mapping rendered '3 lignes / 6 colonnes / 0 doublons'
Fuzzy auto-mapping (visible in screenshot): Nom Complet→Nom complet, Mail→Courriel, Tel Portable→Téléphone, Entreprise→Entreprise, Notes Client→Notes, Tag→Tags — 6/6 mappées
duplicate-action dropdown defaults to 'Ignorer' (3 options confirmed: skip/overwrite/create)
Step 3 stats: Imported=3, Updated=0, Skipped=0, Errors=0
Toast '3 importés, 0 mis à jour, 0 ignorés' shown after wizard finish
Alpha QA / Beta QA / Gamma QA visible in table post-import
Cleanup: delete fired for all 4 test contacts
action_items:
Wrap badges inside SheetDescription with a /
wrapper or replace SheetDescription with a
to fix the
in

DOM-nesting warning.
Add a default/loading SheetTitle (VisuallyHidden) inside ContactDetailSheet for the skeleton state so Radix Dialog accessibility warning disappears.
Investigate failed Supabase realtime WSS connection (wss://localhost/?token=...) — minor but pollutes console.

Edit→change-status to 'hot' did not persist in table during this run. RCA-likely is test selector collision (the FilterBar shows 'Chaud 0' button which 'text=Chaud' may match first). Recommend exposing data-testid on each Select option (e.g. 'form-status-option-hot') so QA scripts can target unambiguously. NOT a confirmed product bug — please verify manually.
critical_code_review_comments: Contacts.jsx is 660 lines and embeds many sub-components (ContactDetailSheet, InfoTab, HistoryTab, NotesTab, Avatar, Toast). Consider splitting into /components/contacts/* files for maintainability (>700 lines limit hit soon).
SheetDescription wraps Badge components → invalid DOM nesting (div in p). Repeats in Contacts.jsx ContactDetailSheet header.
Inline fetch() calls scattered in Contacts.jsx, ContactForm.jsx and ImportWizard.jsx — extract into a contactsApi.js client for DRY and consistent error handling.
ContactForm POST/PATCH returns saved.contact || saved — fragile contract. Standardize backend to always return { contact } and adapt client.
Select options in ImportWizard mapping use plain strings; would benefit from data-testid per option to make QA deterministic (currently only the Select trigger has testId).
seed_data_creation: Created /tmp/qa_test.csv with 3 rows. Created in DB: 1 manual contact (QA Test Contact) + 3 imported (Alpha/Beta/Gamma QA). All 4 deletions requested at end of test (auto-accepted confirm dialog).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3B (Contacts CRUD + CSV Import Wizard) is functionally working end-to-end. The fuzzy auto-mapping correctly resolves French multi-word headers. The only items remaining are cosmetic console warnings (Radix Dialog a11y + DOM nesting) and an unverified status-edit persistence (test-side selector collision suspected). Next QA: add data-testid to each Select option to deterministically validate status edits.
rca of the issue: Edit-status anomaly RCA: my Playwright used 'text=Chaud' to click the option, but the page already had a FilterBar pill 'Chaud 0' visible behind the Sheet. Playwright likely matched the filter badge under the sheet overlay. Mitigation: add per-option data-testid (e.g., form-status-option-hot) and re-test.
